title: Kannada actress Ranya Rao released after 1-year detention in gold smuggling case
description: Kannada actress Harshavardhini Ranya alias Ranya Rao, and others who were arrested in March 2025 for smuggling gold from Dubai, have been released from preventive detention.Having completed a year of detention under the Conservation of Foreign Exchange and Prevention of Smuggling Activities Act, 1974 (COFEPOSA), Rao was granted bail by Special Economic Offences Judge Vishwanath Gowdar.The Directorate of Revenue Intelligence (DRI) had arrested Ranya for smuggling 14.2 kg gold worth ₹12.56 crore f
